subject: Re: Flowmingo: Interview invitation for Sales Growth Business Partner - Kanak Raval
customer_message:
Dear Jessica ,

I hope this email finds you well .  My health was detoriated and had a
severe urine infection so I couldn't attempted the AI interview.

Request you if possible please give me only one opportunity if job vacancy
is available.

Request you to share new link which is be available for 48 hrs once you
allow me to do the same.


Regards
Kanak


On Tue, 21 Apr, 2026, 8:30 am , <support@flowmingo.ai> wrote:

> Dear Kanak,
>
> Thank you for your message. I appreciate your promptness in informing us
> about your situation. It’s great to hear that you've been granted the
> extension until either the end of the day on Thursday or before 1 PM on
> Wednesday, April 22nd. Please take care of yourself, and whenever you
> complete the AI interview, feel free to share it with us.
>
> Let us know if you have any questions,
>
> Best regards,
>
> *Jessica from Flowmingo Customer Support Team*
> *Mobile / WhatsApp (Support Hotline)*: (+84) 989 877 953
>
> *

sent_reply:
Dear Kanak,

I'm truly sorry to hear about your health issues, and I hope you are
starting to feel better now. I understand your request for a chance to
complete the AI interview for the Sales Growth Business Partner position.

Unfortunately, I cannot share a new interview link or promise an additional
opportunity. I recommend checking back for openings on our careers page or
applying again when you are ready. We're always looking for passionate
candidates.

Let us know if you have any questions,

Best regards,

*Jessica from Flowmingo Customer Support Team*
